case_title: KINETIC LEASING, INC. BY AND THROUGH ITS DIVISION VS. SKYVIEW AVIATION, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINETIC LEASING, INC. BY AND THROUGH ITS DIVISION FIRST BANK AND TRUST LEASING SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKYVIEW AVIATION, INC. BENEVIDES, PEDRO $1,032,971.34 PRINCIPAL, $673,440.02 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,706,861.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINETIC LEASING, INC. BY AND THROUGH ITS DIVISION FIRST BANK AND TRUST LEASING SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SKYVIEW AVIATION, INC. BENEVIDES, PEDRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF WILLIAM E. WEISS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINETIC LEASING, INC. BY AND THROUGH ITS DIVISION FIRST BANK AND TRUST LEASING SERVICES
